sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Compare segmentation
before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

print("BEFORE nodes:")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash'][:8]}")

print("\nAFTER nodes:")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash'][:8]}")

# Check the ascii around the clicked area
before_lines = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(28, 32):
    if before_lines[i] != after_lines[i]:
        print(f"\nRow {i} changed:")
        print(f"  BEFORE: {before_lines[i]}")
        print(f"  AFTER:  {after_lines[i]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
